title: iodine_1995
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 2]
Here's the technical content extracted from the provided text:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

* I₂ (as a notation for molecular iodine)

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Figure 1:**
    *   Axes:
        *   Wavelength (nm) - x axis, ranges from 180 to 340
        *   Intensity (arb.) - y axis, ranges logarithmically from 0.001 to 1
    *   Curves:
        *   UV spectrum of pure I₂

**3. Tables:**

*   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   **Figure 2:** Experimental setup in test section of Mach 6 wind tunnel
    *   Components:
        *   Mach 6 Nozzle
        *   Window
        *   Model
        *   Diffuser
        *   Laser "ribbon"
        *   Test Section
        *   CCD Camera

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Excitation wavelength: 193 nm
*   Cell dimensions: 1 cm square
*   Cell temperature: 300 K
*   Correction factor: 40
*   Fluorescence emission wavelength: 340 nm
*   Buffer gas pressure: 10 Torr
*   Discrete/McLennan bands decrease: 75 percent
*   Integrated fluorescence decrease: 45 percent (over 193-600 nm)
*   Mach number: Mach 6
*   Test section length: 1.8 m
*   Test section diameter: 1.5 m
*   Stagnation Pressure: 0.35 to 2.07 MPa (50-300 psia)
*   Stagnation Temperature: up to 700 K (800°F)
*   Reynolds Number: 1.6-19.7 x 10^6 m^-1
*   Typical Run Conditions: 2.07 MPa (300 psia), 589 K (600°F)
*   Free-stream velocity: 1020 m/s
*   Excimer Laser Wavelength: 193 nm
*   Laser Bandwidth: 1 cm^-1
*   Pulse Repetition Rate: 10 Hz
*   Pulse Energy: 100 mJ
*   Pulse Duration: 15 ns
*   Ribbon Beam Thickness: 0.5 mm
*   Ribbon Beam Width: 20 mm
*   Ribbon Beam Energy: 50 mJ/pulse
* Test Section flow rate in 1 to 2 s with typical test runs lasting from 30 to 60 s.

title: iodine_1995
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
Here's a breakdown of the technical content extracted from the provided text and image:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   1.  8 x 10^17 cm^-3
*   f/1.1

**2. Graphs/Charts:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   **Figure 3: Composite view of the wake of a truncated cylinder model at Mach 6.**
    *   Components and Labels:
        *   Ceramic model (38 mm dia)
        *   Mach 6 flow (arrow indicating direction)
        *   Molecular seed (arrow indicating position near stagnation point)
        *   Steel backing (supporting the model)
        *   Laser sheet positions (A, B, C - indicate laser ribbon positions in wake)
        *   Data (referencing the image showing flow visualization)

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   CCD camera array: 768x488 pixels
*   S-20Q photocathode range: 185-600 nm
*   Cassegrain lens focal length: 90 mm
*   Cassegrain lens: f/1.1
*   Laser ribbon spatial resolution: ~1 mm
*   Schott BG-24 filter: Reject 193 nm, transmit 210-600 nm
*   Intensifier gate width: 400 ns
*   Iodine tincture composition: 1 gm crystalline iodine / 12.5 ml ethanol
*   Area covered by seeding solution: 1 x 4 cm²
*   Thickness of I2 surface layer: ~0.5 mm
*   Iodine added per run: < 0.01 g
*   Model diameter: 38 mm
*   Flow Mach number: 6
*   Laser position A to center distance: approximately 25 mm
*   Position uncertainty of laser sheets: +-2 mm

title: iodine_1995
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
Here's a breakdown of the technical content extracted from the provided text:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

NONE

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Axes:**
    *   X-axis: Power Density (MW/cm²)
    *   Y-axis: Intensity (a.u.)
*   **Curves:**
    *   Curve displaying the region of linearity and onset of optical saturation. The curve increases linearly then plateaus
*   **Key Values:**
    *   Power density range: 0.001 to 100 MW/cm²
    *   Intensity range: 0.01 to 100 a.u.

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   I₂ LIF signals in the wake region were approximately 60 times greater than the Rayleigh signal.
*   Density of I₂ in the model wake: approximately 3 x 10^12 cm⁻³
*   Excitation beam wavelength: 193 nm
*   McLennan band: 325 nm
*   Buffer gas pressure: 1 Torr
*   Mach number: 6 and 8
*   Laser power density for linear fluorescence: approximately 0.1 MW/cm²
*   Mach 6 tunnel measurements conducted at approximately 30 MW/cm²
*   Hole diameter in ceramic model: 0.01 mm
*   Ceramic model cylinder diameter: 38 mm
*   Slot in aluminum model: 1 x 1 x 5 mm³
*   Collisionally induced band: 340 nm
